name: judge-me-pp-mcp
description: Our REST API lets you access to resources and perform actions on behalf of a store.

judge_me_private_apikey.title: JUDGE_ME_PRIVATE_APIKEY
judge_me_private_apikey.description: Sets JUDGE_ME_PRIVATE_APIKEY for the Judge Me MCP server. Get a credential from https://help.judge.me/en/articles/8278390-integrating-with-judge-me.
